'''Kant''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] criminal.

==Biography==
As a boy, Kant thought a lot about personal freedom, influenced by a [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] who thought it was the most important thing to [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. But when he finally saw the galaxy himself, Kant grew disgruntled with its cultures, because he felt that they were too oppressive. He helped radical groups by [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] them goods and doing other illegal activities.<ref name="UA" />
